id.description: The id of the modified person object.

created.description: The timestamp of the person object's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the person object's last update.

display_name.description: The display name for the person.

public_nick_name.description: The public nick name for the person.

tax_resident.description: The user's tax residence numbers for different countries.

date_of_birth.description: The person's date of birth. Accepts ISO8601 date formats.

country_of_birth.description: The person's country of birth. Formatted as a SO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

nationality.description: The person's nationality. Formatted as a SO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

language.description: The person's preferred language. Formatted as a ISO 639-1 language code plus a ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, seperated by an underscore.

region.description: The person's preferred region. Formatted as a ISO 639-1 language code plus a ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, seperated by an underscore.

gender.description: The person's gender. Can be MALE, FEMALE or UNKNOWN.

version_terms_of_service.description: The version of the terms of service accepted by the user.

status.description: The user status. The user status. Can be: ACTIVE, BLOCKED, SIGNUP, RECOVERY, DENIED or ABORTED.

sub_status.description: The user sub-status. Can be: NONE, FACE_RESET, APPROVAL, APPROVAL_DIRECTOR, APPROVAL_PARENT, APPROVAL_SUPPORT, COUNTER_IBAN, IDEAL or SUBMIT.

session_timeout.description: The setting for the session timeout of the user in seconds.

daily_limit_without_confirmation_login.description: The amount the user can pay in the session without asking for credentials.

notification_filters.description: The types of notifications that will result in a push notification or URL callback for this UserPerson.
